sections.paragraph:
verb לאגוד

to bind, tie, bundle; to join

verb להיאגד

be bound, tied; bundled

verb לאגד (>>איגד)

to tie, bind; to unite, federate

verb אוגד

be bound, tied; bundled; united

verb להתאגד

to unite, associate, combine

verb להאגיד

to incorporate

masculine noun

bunch, cluster, fasciculus, fascicle

noun

Egged, name of an Israeli bus company

masculine noun

bandage, plaster
